title: Angular Interview Traps
subtitle: The pitfalls interviewers deliberately test — memory leaks, ECAIBCC, OnPush gotchas
description: Senior Angular interviews include deliberate trap questions about common pitfalls. Master the ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError, Observable memory leaks, OnPush edge cases, async pipe gotchas, and NgModule traps that trip up even experienced developers.
learningOutcomes: Identify and fix Observable subscription memory leaks
Know the OnPush scenarios that fail and why they fail
Avoid async pipe pitfalls including multiple subscriptions
Understand injection token traps and multi-provider ordering
Anticipate guard execution order and resolver blocking issues
Identify NgModule double-registration and forRoot/forChild mistakes
Debug detached views and wrong-context detectChanges() calls
